metadata.name: BreachPath Demo Mission Network
metadata.description: Small demo cyber network for attack-path analysis.

nodes.label: Workstation 17
nodes.description: User workstation suspected of running suspicious commands.

nodes.label: Email Server
nodes.description: Internal email server used by staff and automated notifications.

nodes.label: File Server
nodes.description: Shared file server containing operational documents and saved scripts.

nodes.label: VPN Gateway
nodes.description: Remote access gateway used by staff and partner systems.

nodes.label: Admin Account
nodes.description: Privileged administrator identity with access to core infrastructure.

nodes.label: Domain Controller
nodes.description: Central identity service controlling authentication and policy.

nodes.label: Drone Operations Server
nodes.description: Mission operations server used to coordinate drone tasking data.

nodes.label: Logistics Database
nodes.description: Database containing logistics, supply, and deployment information.

nodes.label: Monitoring System
nodes.description: Security monitoring platform collecting alerts from key systems.

nodes.label: Backup Server
nodes.description: Backup service with stored recovery data for important systems.

edges.description: Email attachments and links can reach the user workstation.
The workstation has access to shared files on the file server.
The file server stores credentials that could expose the admin account.
The admin account can control the domain controller.
The domain controller can grant access to the drone operations server.
The workstation can authenticate to the VPN gateway.
The VPN gateway can access the logistics database.
The backup server stores recovery data for the domain controller.
The monitoring system collects file server security events.
The file server can reach the backup server for scheduled backups.
